# TryLook-ai

> Staging / local preview: production deploy generates this file with URLs from VITE_SITE_URL. Canonical on live site: https://www.trylook-ai.com/llms.txt

> AI virtual try-on for e-commerce. Shoppers upload a photo and preview garments before purchase.

## Key pages (production)

- https://www.trylook-ai.com/
- https://www.trylook-ai.com/demo
- https://www.trylook-ai.com/shopify-virtual-try-on
- https://www.trylook-ai.com/woocommerce-virtual-try-on
- https://www.trylook-ai.com/webflow-virtual-try-on
- https://www.trylook-ai.com/tiendanube-virtual-try-on
- https://www.trylook-ai.com/mercadoshops-virtual-try-on
- https://www.trylook-ai.com/hostinger-virtual-try-on
